title: clinopodium cordatum
intro: Clinopodium cordatum, also known as Mountain mint, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Clinopodium cordatum include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems, such as coughs and colds. The herbal preparations of Clinopodium cordatum include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
